Launch App
The Cost of Sovereignty

Valuation
Redefined.

Traditional estate planning is an extractionary industry dependent on state violence and paperwork. We replaced it with a smart contract. The mathematics are free.

Protocol Standard

$0/ Forever

Interact directly with the smart contracts on Polygon via your own infrastructure. You only pay network gas fees.

  • Full Client-Side AES-256-GCM SDK
  • Deploy immutable Vault Smart Contracts
  • Self-hosted Heartbeat trigger scripts
  • Direct API / ABI interface
  • Open-source local storage fallback
RECOMMENDED

Lifetime Vault

$999/ One-Time

Institutional-grade infrastructure orchestration. We handle the heavy lifting, pinning, and heartbeat monitoring via our edge nodes.

  • Guaranteed IPFS Pinning via Web3.Storage
  • Automated Multi-Node Heartbeat Monitoring
  • Priority Email & SMS Trigger Alerts
  • Dedicated Node Allocation
  • VIP Bug Bounty / Incident Support

Legacy vs. Protocol

An economical analysis of automated inheritance versus traditional legal retainers.

Metric / LiabilityTraditional TrustDigital Will Protocol
Upfront Cost$5,000 - $15,000+Gas Fees (~$2.00)
Retainer Fees$500 - $2,000 / year$0 (Immutable on-chain)
Execution Speed6 - 18 months (Probate)Under 2 minutes
Privacy GuaranteeAtty-Client Privilege (Revocable)Zero-Knowledge (Mathematics)
Asset LimitsComplex tax auditsUnlimited Cryptographic Keys

Stop paying for bureaucracy.

Read the Implementation Docs

Securing digital legacies for the decentralized future. Your assets, your rules.
